title: Talona's Craftable Spawn Eggs And Spawner
description: This Mod Adds A Craftable Mob Spawner And Spawn Eggs. What More Could You Want?
body:
This Mod Adds 1 New Item, A Craftable Monster/Mob Spawner, And Recipes For Every Vanilla Minecraft Mob.

**New Item: Mob Soul**
This Item Is Dropped From Any Mob With A 25%.


**Mob Spawner Recipe**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Requires: 4 Mob Souls, 4 Iron Bars, and 1 Egg

![ms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e049e7b7ce296e7956266832f88f9a3a609760ab.png)


</details>
